projectDescription: A novel Android app store focused on security, privacy, and usability, featuring app signing key pinning, signed repository metadata, and automatic unprivileged updates.
keyFeatures: App signing key pinning to prevent supply chain attacks
Signed repository metadata with cryptographic verification
Automatic, unprivileged, unattended updates on Android 12+
No remote APK signing — developers retain control
No account requirement for installing apps
Meaningful quality control for submitted apps
publicApiSurface: AllApps screen — Browse all available apps in the store
InstalledApps screen — View apps installed via Accrescent
UpdatableApps screen — View and apply available updates
AppDetails screen — Install, update, open, or unarchive specific apps
Settings screen — Configure theme, dynamic color, automatic updates, and network conditions
AutoUpdateWorker — Background worker running every 8 hours to check and apply updates
RepoDataFetcherImpl.fetchRepoData() — Fetches and signature-verifies the signed repository manifest
AppManager.downloadAndInstall() — Downloads, verifies, and installs split APKs
AppManager.isUpdateAvailable() — Checks if an update is available for a given app
AppManager.uninstall() — Uninstalls an app via Android PackageInstaller
AppManager.unarchive() — Restores an archived app on Android 15+
